'''Kuat Passenger Port''' was a transfer station located just outside the [[Kuat system/Legends|Kuat system]] made up of several immense domes.<ref name="PSG" />

==Characteristics==
The port, one of Kuat's more colossal [[Space station/Legends|space stations]],<ref name="Star Wars Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes">''[[Star Wars Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes]]''</ref> often saw over two billion visitors per day.

A [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] transit system within the complex enabled visitors to quickly travel between the major sections of the port—the [[Core Dome]], [[Outbound Dome]], [[Military Dome]], [[Kuat Dome]], and [[Kuat Central Plaza]].

The port employed many beings—some as baggage carriers, such as [[Benni]].<ref name="PSG" />

{{Station-stub}}
